title: MicroSearch API routing training row
description: One line per JSONL row: supervised intent -> tool + arguments for micro model training or eval.

intent.description: Natural language user request in the style of production traffic.

expected_tool.description: MCP tool name exactly as in tools/list.

expected_arguments.description: JSON object of arguments; use placeholders for secrets, e.g. {"apiKey": "<REDACTED>"}.

negative_intent.description: If true, model should refuse or return no tool (guardrail example).
